subject: Fix SO build, update aai-common dep.
commit_message:
Fix SO build, update aai-common dep.

This is temporary fix until
AAI project fixes release artifact
aai-commons aai-schema 1.2.0 to
depend on oparent 1.1.0 rather
than on 1.1.0-SNAPSHOT which doesn't
exist now.

Also changed depencency of so libs
to 1.2.0-SNAPSHOT due to the fact that
so libs 1.2.0 is based on oparent 1.1.0-SNAPSHOT
as well.

Issue-ID: SO-533
Change-Id: Iae6bc176b0a6687e8f8d0634e065e94059daccf1
Signed-off-by: Marcus G K Williams <marcus.williams@intel.com>

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

It appears the problem is with aai-common release 1.2.0 - its dependent on oparent 1.1.0-SNAPSHOT which is no longer available. It should be based on 1.1.0. See below:

https://nexus.onap.org/content/repositories/releases/org/onap/aai/aai-common/aai-common/1.2.0/aai-common-1.2.0.pom

Patch Set 8:

Apparently snapshot builds are not enable for SO repositories. We need a new release version, but it also seems prudent to enable snapshot creation and storage in nexus as a temporary workaround and future convenience. Working to enable snapshots for so/libs here: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/38693/

Patch Set 8:

> Apparently snapshot builds are not enable for SO repositories. We
 > need a new release version, but it also seems prudent to enable
 > snapshot creation and storage in nexus as a temporary workaround
 > and future convenience. Working to enable snapshots for so/libs
 > here: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/38693/

A new release version of so/libs 1.2.0 that does not depend on oparent 1.1.0-SNAPSHOT

Patch Set 8:

(1 comment)

This is blocked until either there is a new release version of so/libs or snapshots are enabled for so/libs (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/38693). The former would be best, but the later could be a short term fix and it seems like snapshots should be enabled anyway. Then we could change the the dependency on so/libs and fix the build.

Abandoned

Based on email replies this should be fixed by AAI soon.
